column1: # Diamond stretch-and-skew sweep — one row per computed cell shape. 1179 rows.
# WHAT THIS IS. Each row is one shape of a 2-carbon-atom box, computed twice by VASP:
#   <run_directory_inside_archive>/1-cheap-pbe-atoms-relaxed/    fast approximation, atoms allowed to settle
#   <run_directory_inside_archive>/2-accurate-hse06-atoms-fixed/ accurate hybrid, single shot at the above geometry
# Reference shape: the experimental diamond cube edge a0 = 3.567 A. The 2-atom box uses the
#   source_archive_file                    which .tar.gz in renamed-archives/ holds this run
#   run_directory_inside_archive           path inside that archive. Opaque locator: hand it to tar,
#                                          do not parse it. Filter on the numeric columns instead.
#   kind_of_shape_change                   which sampling family this point belongs to
#   target_cell_volume_in_cubic_angstroms  only for scale-all-axes-uniformly; blank elsewhere
#   fractional_stretch_along_[xyz]_axis    fractional length change. 0.005 = 0.5% LONGER. blank = axis not stretched.
#   skew_of_[a]_axis_toward_[b]_axis       skew amount. 0.05 means a shifts by 0.05 x b. blank = plane not skewed.
#                                          These are simple skews: they carry a rotation, and they preserve
#                                          volume exactly (det F = 1.000000 for every skew point).
#   duplicate_group                        NON-EMPTY = this shape is computed more than once in this dataset.
#                                          72 rows across 24 groups are duplicates: 24 single-skew shapes each
#                                          appear once in skew-one-plane and twice in skew-two-planes (each plane
#                                          belongs to 2 of the 3 plane-pairs). All copies are BIT-IDENTICAL.
#                                          *** DE-DUPLICATE BEFORE ANY FIT OR TRAINING SET. *** Otherwise these
#                                          24 shapes carry 3x weight. 1179 rows = 1131 distinct shapes.
#   recovery_status                        complete for all 1179 rows. The 2026-07-16 re-download from the
#                                          original source healed the earlier truncation; nothing is partial.
# TRAPS. Do not infer the deformation from the directory name — recompute it from the lattice.
# Do not compare the deformation gradient F across families: the scale-all-axes-uniformly POSCARs use a
# different lattice frame, so their F carries a rotation that is a frame artifact, not physics
# (F^T F is isotropic to 1e-11). Compare Green-Lagrange strain or F^T F instead.
